context7.description: Live documentation lookup — HuggingFace, PyTorch, LangChain, and any library docs via resolve-library-id and query-docs.

sequential-thinking.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning for complex architectural or ML-pipeline decisions.

github.description: GitHub PRs, issues, repos. Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN; for GHE also set GITHUB_API_URL.

exa-web-search.description: Neural web search via Exa — broader research after GitHub search and context7.

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E checks of eval dashboards and agent UIs.

filesystem.description: Filesystem access for local ML artifacts and project trees. Adjust path per machine.
